final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT pitch deck cover slide for a domestic China GP-facing financing roadshow announcing GPT-5.5, with Sam Altman as the keynote speaker, in the restrained authority of 原研哉's typographic precision.

Style/medium: institutional pitch deck cover slide with the matte coated-paper authority and generous white space of 原研哉's print work — designed to project credibility before a single word is spoken
Composition: centered typographic hierarchy on a clean field, product name at the top tier, event title in the middle register, speaker credential line anchored at the bottom — breathing room between every layer
Subject: GPT-5.5 launch financing roadshow cover, speaker Sam Altman (奥特曼) presented with full institutional credential line
Scene/backdrop: near-white or deep graphite background with a single subtle geometric accent — a thin rule or soft gradient horizon suggesting forward momentum
Lighting/mood: the quiet authority of a boardroom before the lights dim — cool, composed, carrying the weight of a historic moment without announcing it
Color palette: cool graphite and near-white as the dominant field, one warm accent (gold or amber) reserved for the product name or a single rule — the tension between precision and ambition
Materials/textures: matte coated paper feel with a whisper of emboss on the title, no gloss, no gradients that shout
Text (verbatim): GPT-5.5 / 奥特曼 / Sam Altman / 融资路演
Constraints: all text legible at projection scale, Chinese roadshow conventions observed (speaker name + title block, event type label, date/logo placeholder area), GP-facing institutional tone throughout
Avoid: consumer-app color palette, Western startup neon or gradient overload, cluttered decorative elements, playful illustration, any visual that reads as retail marketing rather than institutional finance
